    SELECT [j].[Id], [j].[CreatedAt], [j].[CreatedBy], [j].[Description], [j].[FiscalPeriodId], [j].[PostedAt], [j].[PostedBy], [j].[Status], [j].[TransactionDate], [j].[VoucherNumber]

    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [j0]
INNER JOIN [FiscalPeriods] AS [f] ON [j0].[FiscalPeriodId] = [f].[Id]

            BEGIN
                DECLARE @CurrentAssetsId UNIQUEIDENTIFIER = (
                    SELECT Id FROM Accounts WHERE AccountCode = '11'
                );
                DECLARE @CurrencyId UNIQUEIDENTIFIER = (
                    SELECT TOP 1 Id FROM Currencies WHERE IsLocal = 1
                );

2026-05-26 00:56:22.022 +03:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (8ms) [Parameters=[@__p_0='?' (DbType = Int32), @__p_1='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT [j0].[Id], [j0].[CreatedAt], [j0].[CreatedBy], [j0].[Description], [j0].[FiscalPeriodId], [j0].[PostedAt], [j0].[PostedBy], [j0].[Status], [j0].[TransactionDate], [j0].[VoucherNumber], [f].[Id], [f].[EndDate], [f].[IsClosed], [f].[StartDate], [f].[YearName], [j1].[Id], [j1].[AccountId], [j1].[CostCenterId], [j1].[Credit], [j1].[CurrencyId], [j1].[Debit], [j1].[ExchangeRate], [j1].[ForeignCredit], [j1].[ForeignDebit], [j1].[JournalEntryMasterId], [j1].[Memo]
FROM (
    SELECT [j].[Id], [j].[CreatedAt], [j].[CreatedBy], [j].[Description], [j].[FiscalPeriodId], [j].[PostedAt], [j].[PostedBy], [j].[Status], [j].[TransactionDate], [j].[VoucherNumber]
    FROM [JournalEntryMasters] AS [j]
    ORDER BY [j].[TransactionDate] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [j0]
INNER JOIN [FiscalPeriods] AS [f] ON [j0].[FiscalPeriodId] = [f].[Id]
